sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports seeing blood in their urine. He also reports experiencing fatigue and mild flank pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 130/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. The patient appears well-oriented and cooperative.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's hematuria, fatigue, and flank pain are concerning for possible urinary tract infection or kidney stone.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders a urine culture and sensitivity. The doctor recommends increasing fluid intake to 8 glasses per day. The doctor schedules a follow-up appointment in 7 days to assess response to treatment.
